name: KENSOKU: OUGI - SHUNSHIN RENDAN (SWIFT FISTS: SECRET SKILL - BODY FLICKER COMBO)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: C, H

You seem to flicker in and out of existence as you make lightning quick strikes against many foes. Make an unarmed or melee weapon attack against the primary target, which deals 8d6 damage of a type according to the weapon used. Then, you leap to a secondary target within 20 ft to make an attack, then to another, attacking up to 1 secondary target per 2 levels, each within 20 ft of the previous one.

The secondary targets take half damage, and the attacks cannot score critical hits, nor can you target the same creature with more than one attack. The movement is made as though using Shunpo, leaving footprints and possibly springing traps.

Mastery: The first step allows you to deal nonlethal damage by taking a -4 penalty to the Perform check and the attack rolls, assuming your weapon allows for nonlethal attacks.
